info.name: Swap 1inch - 按兑换类型（网络为变量）
info.description:
以兑换类型为维度：主币<>代币、代币<>主币、代币<>代币。每条用例内用 testCases 数组覆盖多个网络，网络与 token 地址直接在脚本中维护。

- 01-1inch-询价：3 条（每条内循环请求多网络）
- 02-1inch-构建：3 条（同上）

exec:
const testCases = [
  {
    "name": "Ethereum.ETH 1 → USDC",
    "params": {
      "fromTokenAddress": "",
      "toTokenAddress": "0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48",
      "fromTokenAmount": "1",
      "fromNetworkId": "evm--1",
      "toNetworkId": "evm--1",
      "protocol": "Swap",
      "userAddress": "0x4EF880525383ab4E3d94b7689e3146bF899A296e",
      "slippagePercentage": "0.5",
      "autoSlippage": "true",
      "receivingAddress": "0x4EF880525383ab4E3d94b7689e3146bF899A296e",
      "kind": "sell",
      "toTokenAmount": "",
      "denySingleSwapProvider": ""
    }
  },
  {
    "name": "Polygon 10 POL → USDC",
    "params": {
      "fromTokenAddress": "",
      "toTokenAddress": "0x3c499c542cef5e3811e1192ce70d8cc03d5c3359",
      "fromTokenAmount": "10",
      "fromNetworkId": "evm--137",
      "toNetworkId": "evm--137",
      "protocol": "Swap",
      "userAddress": "0x4EF880525383ab4E3d94b7689e3146bF899A296e",
      "slippagePercentage": "0.5",
      "autoSlippage": "true",
      "receivingAddress": "0x4EF880525383ab4E3d94b7689e3146bF899A296e",
      "kind": "sell",
      "toTokenAmount": "",
      "denySingleSwapProvider": ""
    }
  },
  {
    "name": "Arbitrum.ETH 1 → USDC",
    "params": {
      "fromTokenAddress": "",
      "toTokenAddress": "0xaf88d065e77c8cc2239327c5edb3a432268e5831",
      "fromTokenAmount": "1",
      "fromNetworkId": "evm--42161",
      "toNetworkId": "evm--42161",
      "protocol": "Swap",
      "userAddress": "0x4EF880525383ab4E3d94b7689e3146bF899A296e",
      "slippagePercentage": "0.5",
      "autoSlippage": "true",
      "receivingAddress": "0x4EF880525383ab4E3d94b7689e3146bF899A296e",
      "kind": "sell",
      "toTokenAmount": "",
      "denySingleSwapProvider": ""
    }
  }
];

function buildQuery(params) { return Object.entries(params).filter(function(kv){ return kv[1]!==undefined&&kv[1]!==null; }).map(function(kv){ return encodeURIComponent(kv[0])+'='+encodeURIComponent(String(kv[1])); }).join('&'); }

function runCase(i){ if(i>=testCases.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c=testCases[i]; pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL+'?'+buildQuery(c.params), method: 'GET', header: Object.entries(headers).map(function(e){ return { key: e[0], value: String(e[1]) }; }) }, function(err, res){ if(err){ pm.test('['+c.name+'] 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code=res.code||res.status; pm.test('['+c.name+'] HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code).to.equal(200); }); var json=res.json(); pm.test('['+c.name+'] 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(json.code).to.eql(0); }); var d=json.data; pm.test('['+c.name+'] 1inch 有效报价', function(){ var item=(d||[]).find(function(x){ return x.info&&x.info.provider&&String(x.info.provider).toLowerCase().indexOf('1inch')>=0&&String(x.info.provider).toLowerCase().indexOf('fusion')<0; }); pm.expect(item, 'data 中不存在 1inch 条目（非 Fusion）').to.not.be.undefined; pm.expect(item.errorMessage, '1inch 条目携带 errorMessage: '+item.errorMessage).to.be.oneOf([undefined, null, '']); var hasQuote=item.toAmount||item.fromAmount||(item.info&&item.info.toAmount); pm.expect(hasQuote, '1inch 条目无有效报价金额').to.be.ok; }); runCase(i+1); }); }

function buildQuery(params) { return Object.entries(params).filter(function(kv){ return kv[1]!==undefined&&kv[1]!==null; }).map(function(kv){ return encodeURIComponent(kv[0])+'='+encodeURIComponent(String(kv[1])); }).join('&'); }

function runCase(i){ if(i>=testCases.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c=testCases[i]; pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL+'?'+buildQuery(c.params), method: 'GET', header: Object.entries(headers).map(function(e){ return { key: e[0], value: String(e[1]) }; }) }, function(err, res){ if(err){ pm.test('['+c.name+'] 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code=res.code||res.status; pm.test('['+c.name+'] HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code).to.equal(200); }); var json=res.json(); pm.test('['+c.name+'] 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(json.code).to.eql(0); }); var d=json.data; pm.test('['+c.name+'] 1inch 有效报价', function(){ var item=(d||[]).find(function(x){ return x.info&&x.info.provider&&String(x.info.provider).toLowerCase().indexOf('1inch')>=0&&String(x.info.provider).toLowerCase().indexOf('fusion')<0; }); pm.expect(item, 'data 中不存在 1inch 条目（非 Fusion）').to.not.be.undefined; pm.expect(item.errorMessage, '1inch 条目携带 errorMessage: '+item.errorMessage).to.be.oneOf([undefined, null, '']); var hasQuote=item.toAmount||item.fromAmount||(item.info&&item.info.toAmount); pm.expect(hasQuote, '1inch 条目无有效报价金额').to.be.ok; }); runCase(i+1); }); }

function buildQuery(params) { return Object.entries(params).filter(function(kv){ return kv[1]!==undefined&&kv[1]!==null; }).map(function(kv){ return encodeURIComponent(kv[0])+'='+encodeURIComponent(String(kv[1])); }).join('&'); }

function runCase(i){ if(i>=testCases.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c=testCases[i]; pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL+'?'+buildQuery(c.params), method: 'GET', header: Object.entries(headers).map(function(e){ return { key: e[0], value: String(e[1]) }; }) }, function(err, res){ if(err){ pm.test('['+c.name+'] 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code=res.code||res.status; pm.test('['+c.name+'] HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code).to.equal(200); }); var json=res.json(); pm.test('['+c.name+'] 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(json.code).to.eql(0); }); var d=json.data; pm.test('['+c.name+'] 1inch 有效报价', function(){ var item=(d||[]).find(function(x){ return x.info&&x.info.provider&&String(x.info.provider).toLowerCase().indexOf('1inch')>=0&&String(x.info.provider).toLowerCase().indexOf('fusion')<0; }); pm.expect(item, 'data 中不存在 1inch 条目（非 Fusion）').to.not.be.undefined; pm.expect(item.errorMessage, '1inch 条目携带 errorMessage: '+item.errorMessage).to.be.oneOf([undefined, null, '']); var hasQuote=item.toAmount||item.fromAmount||(item.info&&item.info.toAmount); pm.expect(hasQuote, '1inch 条目无有效报价金额').to.be.ok; }); runCase(i+1); }); }

function runCase(i){ if(i>=testCases.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c=testCases[i]; var body=c.params; console.log('Build-1inch 主币<>代币 请求 body:', body); pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL, method: 'POST', header: Object.entries(headers).map(function(e){ return { key: e[0], value: String(e[1]) }; }), body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify(body) } }, function(err, res){ if(err){ pm.test('['+c.name+'] 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code=res.code||res.status; if(code===422){ console.log('['+c.name+'] 422 body =>', res.text()); } pm.test('['+c.name+'] HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code).to.equal(200); }); if(code===200){ var json=res.json(); pm.test('['+c.name+'] data.tx 存在', function(){ pm.expect(json.data).to.have.property('tx'); pm.expect(json.data.tx).to.be.ok; }); } runCase(i+1); }); }

function runCase(i){ if(i>=testCases.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c=testCases[i]; var body=c.params; console.log('Build-1inch 代币<>主币 请求 body:', body); pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL, method: 'POST', header: Object.entries(headers).map(function(e){ return { key: e[0], value: String(e[1]) }; }), body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify(body) } }, function(err, res){ if(err){ pm.test('['+c.name+'] 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code=res.code||res.status; if(code===422){ console.log('['+c.name+'] 422 body =>', res.text()); } pm.test('['+c.name+'] HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code).to.equal(200); }); if(code===200){ var json=res.json(); pm.test('['+c.name+'] data.tx 存在', function(){ pm.expect(json.data).to.have.property('tx'); pm.expect(json.data.tx).to.be.ok; }); } runCase(i+1); }); }

function runCase(i){ if(i>=testCases.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c=testCases[i]; var body=c.params; console.log('Build-1inch 代币<>代币 请求 body:', body); pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL, method: 'POST', header: Object.entries(headers).map(function(e){ return { key: e[0], value: String(e[1]) }; }), body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify(body) } }, function(err, res){ if(err){ pm.test('['+c.name+'] 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code=res.code||res.status; if(code===422){ console.log('['+c.name+'] 422 body =>', res.text()); } pm.test('['+c.name+'] HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code).to.equal(200); }); if(code===200){ var json=res.json(); pm.test('['+c.name+'] data.tx 存在', function(){ pm.expect(json.data).to.have.property('tx'); pm.expect(json.data.tx).to.be.ok; }); } runCase(i+1); }); }
